title: Docs + /stack-secrets skill + corpus wiring. Authored corpus/ops/secrets-spec.md (the net-new blueprint the skill reads — source-dir/zip layout, the 6-repo/55-gene secret-DNA, the per-repo target-file map, the values-blind safety statement, alias-family vs distinct-similar rules, the waived class, the DIRECTUS_TOKEN non-rearm safety, the CLI + exit contract). Added the /stack-secrets skill (mirrors /stack-seed: read spec -> confirm non-prod target -> build the pinned-tag binary -> run the verb -> report values-blind). Wired CLAUDE.md (skill-table row + Key-Documentation-Locations entry + Interconnected-Documentation rows) + corpus/README.md + corpus/ops/README.md. Retired the manual .env hand-copy prose + the setup_guide.md:447 TODO (-> /stack-secrets), keeping the per-repo key lists as reference (M29-D4). Extended safety.md (§2.9 values-blind / DIRECTUS_TOKEN-non-rearm clause).
position_note: M29 is the 3rd of 4 milestones of v1.6 'stage door' (M27->M30, strictly sequential). M27 = the DNA + ingestion reader + scorer/diff verbs; M28 = the provision engine + the coverage/verify gate + bring-up wiring + demo-aware scoring; M29 = the corpus doc (secrets-spec.md) + the /stack-secrets skill + CLAUDE.md/setup_guide.md/safety.md wiring; M30 = the build-from-stack-dev field-bake (the next + FINAL milestone). After this close: build M30 — do NOT close-release yet.
kind: a rosetta-only docs + skill milestone. ZERO ext code — the ext stayed on main @ 9742126 (= tag stage-door-m28), untouched. The m29/secrets-docs-skill branch is markdown/text only: 2 net-new docs (corpus/ops/secrets-spec.md 290 lines + .claude/skills/stack-secrets/SKILL.md 135 lines) + 5 edits (CLAUDE.md, corpus/README.md, corpus/ops/README.md, corpus/ops/safety.md §2.9, corpus/ops/setup_guide.md) + the planning/close records. close-milestone's merge is entirely rosetta-side m29/secrets-docs-skill -> release/01.60-stage-door; no ext finalization.
